content:
❌ Rejected the contribution.
Comment: Your math is wrong.
You are doing: 1 + (return after tax) - inflation
But it should be: (1 + return) / (1 + inflation)

❌ Rejected the contribution.
Comment: The clash is more of a maths problem than a programming one as it currently lacks any key programming elements such as lists, sets, dictionaries, string manipulation, loops or conditions.
